name: Alan Mathison Turing
label: Person
evidence: "Alan Mathison Turing". | Alan Mathison Turing (; 23 June 1912 – 7 June 1954) was an English mathematician, computer scientist, logician, cryptanalyst, philosopher and theoretical biologist.
